overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic cyberpunk game showing a character walking through a rain-soaked urban environment. The character exits an indoor corridor, ascends a grand staircase, and explores an elevated plaza with monumental architecture and digital billboards overlooking a dense cityscape.

bald man in white shirt and vest walking past the camera from right to left

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sleek, modern interior corridor with glass walls revealing heavy rain outside. The space is dimly lit with artificial lighting, and the character follows a woman in a grey dress toward a slatted exit doorway while other pedestrians pass by.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand exterior staircase ascending from interior to upper plaza

begins ascending the wide concrete staircase toward the upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide concrete staircase with glass railings, moving toward the open plaza above

transparent glass barrier along the left side of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character exits the building onto a grand exterior staircase, ascending toward an upper plaza while rain falls around the sheltered stairwell. Glass railings line the left side, and striped concrete walls flank the stairs as the cityscape becomes visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban plaza with palm trees overlooking the rainy cityscape

events.description: reaches the top of the stairs and enters the open plaza with full city view exposed to rain

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet reflective plaza surface toward the city view, passing palm trees

tropical palm trees lining the edge of the plaza overlooking the city
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the open plaza, the character walks across rain-slicked concrete with palm trees lining the edge. The expansive cityscape of towering skyscrapers fills the background, and the woman from earlier stands near the railing looking out at the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: monumental corridor with large geometric concrete structures and digital billboards

events.description: enters the corridor between massive illuminated geometric concrete monuments
approaching the plaza edge with full view of large digital billboards and neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking between massive concrete monuments toward the city viewpoint, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in white hoodie and black shorts standing near the monument wall
person in blue outfit standing with arms crossed looking at the view

entered.detail: massive sculptural concrete walls with illuminated geometric patterns at the base
large glowing advertisement screens displaying fashion and brand imagery
prominent vertical digital sign with 'KIROSHI' branding
dark rectangular seating structures along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dramatic corridor flanked by massive geometric concrete monuments with illuminated bases. Other pedestrians stand observing the view as the camera approaches the plaza edge, revealing large digital billboards including a prominent 'KIROSHI' sign overlooking the sprawling neon-lit cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, sheltered interior into a vast, rain-soaked cyberpunk plaza overlooking a neon cityscape. It begins within a sleek, modern corridor of glass walls and artificial light, following a woman in a grey dress toward a slatted exit. As the character steps outside, the scene shifts to a grand exterior staircase where the camera ascends past striped concrete walls and glass railings while the urban horizon first becomes visible. The view then expands onto an open, rain-slicked plaza lined with palm trees, leading the character past the waiting woman toward a series of massive geometric concrete monuments with illuminated bases. Finally, the camera pushes through this dramatic corridor to the plaza's edge, revealing towering skyscrapers and glowing digital billboards, including a prominent Kiroshi sign, against the sprawling city.
